---
title: "About"
image: images/marcos_abreu.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/marcos-abreu-pmp/
    - icon: mastodon
      text: Mastodon
      href: https://fosstodon.org/@abreums
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Abreums
---

## Bio

Marcos Abreu works as Project Manager and Change Management Advisor. His experience includes customization and implementation of corporate Software, Data Analytics, cloud base systems, e-commerce, Sales and Marketing systems, Supply Chain systems, financial and procurement systems, portfolio management, program managent and agile practices.\
He also act as professor in University teaching Project Management, ITIL and Change Management.\
Data analysis and statistics are his favorite subjects.

## Recent Experience

**Simoldes Plásticos** \| Consultant \| February 2025 - April 2026

**ASICS** \| Consultant \| October 2023 - January 2025

**Mars Wrigley** \| Consultant \| December 2022 - September 2023

**Exxon Mobil** \| Change Management Advisor \| August 2021 - October 2022

**COPEL** \| Project Manager \| November 2020 - July 2021

**NTT Data** \| Abril 2016 - February 2020

**ICG** \| September 2013 - January 2016

**Konsultex** \| July 2012 - August 2013

**PM21** \| July 2003 - November 2011

## Education

**Fundação Getúlio Vargas**

MBA in Project Management \| 2002 - 2003.

**UNICAMP**

Electric Engineering \| 1987 - 1991
